skill_text:
A pre-trained image feature vector model using MobileNetV2 architecture on TensorFlow Hub. It generates feature vectors from input images for various applications like image classification, object detection, and image similarity. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Generate feature vectors from images. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/google/tf2-preview/mobilenet_v2/feature_vector/4'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `tensorflow_hub__image_feature_vector__hub_load_https_tfhub_dev_google_tf2_preview_mobilenet_v2_feature_vector_4` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
